svg.title: CPU Scheduler fairness dashboard for balanced-seed-17
svg.desc: Per-process slowdown and waiting-time bars comparing SRTF, RR (q=2), MLFQ interactive (q=1/2/4, boost=8), MLFQ balanced (q=2/4/8, boost=12), MLFQ throughput (q=4/8/16, boost=off).
svg.text: Lower is better. Each bar is one process under one algorithm.
Lower is better. Each bar is one process under one algorithm.
